title: Nested attenuation changes the spend key and resets a capability's budget

affected_locations.label: root_design_gap
affected_locations.detail: lineage key is immediate parent only

affected_locations.label: attenuation
affected_locations.detail: descendant gets immediate parent id and reset counters

evidence: G(parent=C) is allowed from C's signed embedded spent=0 and spends under fresh key C
proof_gap: No end-to-end OpenBao-backed spend run was executed; data flow and key transition are exact.

facts: valid token holder can call attenuation repeatedly
runtime spend is external and not folded before new child cap calculation
every depth changes the ledger key and restores the cap
